top_signals.title: Yáng Shuāng-zi and Lin King win the International Booker Prize
top_signals.summary: A historical tale of travel, power and romance is the first Taiwanese novel to win the influential award for fiction in translation
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Investors warn of ‘correction’ risk as high-flying stocks defy bond gloom
top_signals.summary: Wall Street indices have surged to a string of record highs despite anxiety over economic fallout from Iran war
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JD Vance stakes his claim
top_signals.summary: In the 2028 battle for the White House, the vice-president may face off against secretary of state Marco Rubio
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: FirstFT: Trump claims Xi promised not to send weapons to Tehran
top_signals.summary: Also in today’s newsletter: Google unveils new version of AI model and Japan and South Korea agree to deepen energy co-operation
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Westgold sells Chalice project to Corazon for $18M
top_signals.summary: Upon completion, Westgold would emerge as a 19.9% shareholder of Corazon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Agnico greenlights $2.4B Hope Bay mine in Nunavut
top_signals.summary: Hope Bay is expected to produce between 400,000 and 435,000 oz. gold annually over an initial 11-year mine life.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
